name: Grand Prix Racing Hero
description: Grand Prix Hero is a driving-themed sports game. Experience the thrill and excitement of Formula One in your living room. From Monaco to Silverstone, you can race at your favorite tracks and master them. Learn to dodge traffic, collect coins and go over speed boosts to achieve a good rank. Use your coins to upgrade your car for the next race and be the best at Grand Prix Hero!
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Boy, Boys, Car, Cars, Fun, H5, HTML5, Kid, Kids, Race, Racing
